items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have a public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items
Approval of Proposals for Upper Campus TK/K and Lower Campus Play Structures with Park Planet for Roosevelt School
Approval of the Board Meeting Dates Calendar for the 2023-24 School Year
Approval of the MOU between San Mateo County Office of Education and Redwood City School District for SEL Curriculum Changing Perspectives for the 2023-2024 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between Peninsula Community Center and the Redwood City School District for the 2023-24 School Year
Public Hearing and Discussion of the Local Control Accountability Plan (LCAP) for 2023-24
Public Hearing for the RCSD 2023-24 Proposed Budget
2023-24 Statement of Reasons for Reserves in Excess of the Minimum State-Recommended Level
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - April 2023
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. President Marquez asked 'Are there any changes to the agenda?' and stated 'Hearing none.' The agenda was then approved as posted.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Moving on to item six, bond program consent items. Are there any questions? Can I just make a. Oh, yeah, go ahead. But can I make a quick comment on this one? Sure. Just wanted to note that the budget that was approved was for one of the lower campus play structures. We were able to replace that lower campus play structure and the swing set. And we're also able to include the demo of the upper campus TK play structure, which was a sandpit, I understand, was problematic. And we're also able to include replacement TK play structure and the soft safety safety surfacing under the TK play structure at the upper campus within the budget that was approved. Great. Thank you. Well, does somebody want to make a motion to. Yeah, I'll move to approved. Seconded. All those in favor? Aye.
